nodes.label: extreme-proof-stack
nodes.meaning: Uses concrete facts, routines, or stats to prove a person's uncommon level

nodes.label: asdicipline--post-1
nodes.opening_hook: "McGregor trained twice a day, every day, for years before his first UFC contract."
nodes.transferable_pattern: Before-fame sacrifice told through concrete training behaviors.
nodes.best_fit: Combat sports, athlete discipline, work-ethic biography

nodes.label: asdicipline--post-4
nodes.opening_hook: "The most disciplined man in boxing history"
nodes.transferable_pattern: Legend claim supported by routine details, record stats, and quote closure.
nodes.best_fit: Boxing, athlete stories, discipline biography

nodes.label: legendperform--post-1
nodes.opening_hook: "He ate up to 10,000 calories a day. Went 5 years without skipping a single day of training."
nodes.transferable_pattern: Absurd routine and record facts prove elite dominance.
nodes.best_fit: Athlete stories, swimming, Olympic mindset

nodes.label: legendperform--post-4
nodes.opening_hook: "Over 90% of his wins are knockouts. In weight classes where knockouts almost never happen."
nodes.transferable_pattern: Surprising stat creates curiosity, then training method explains it.
nodes.best_fit: Boxing, performance analysis, sports biography
nodes.priority_reason: Surprising stat plus explanation is a reliable biography structure.

nodes.label: legendperform--post-5
nodes.opening_hook: "He went 10 years without losing a fight. 154 wins in a row."
nodes.transferable_pattern: Dominance streak plus brutal fundamentals and quote closure.
nodes.best_fit: Combat sports, judo, discipline, athlete stories

nodes.transferable_pattern: Viewer is challenged to survive the hidden standard behind a famous outcome.
nodes.best_fit: Athlete mindset, discipline, toughness, training sacrifice
nodes.priority_reason: Challenge-question hook works well for discipline and athlete accounts.
